proof:
have h : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsIncl.toFun) := by
    intro S T hST
    -- hST : S.val = T.val
    apply QuadSols.ext
    simpa [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply] using hST
  exact h
failed_attempts:
have h : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsIncl := by
    intro A B hA
    have hB : A.val = B.val := by
      have h1 : (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols →ₗ[ℚ] χ.Charges) A = (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols →ₗ[ℚ] χ.Charges) B := hA
      have h2 : (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols →ₗ[ℚ] χ.Charges) A = A.val := by
        simp [quadSolsIncl]
        <;>
        rfl
      have h3 : (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols →ₗ[ℚ] χ.Charges) B = B.val := by
        simp [quadSolsIncl]
        <;>
        rfl
      rw [h2] at h1
      rw [h3] at h1
      exact h1
    have h4 : A = B := by
      have h5 : A.val = B.val := hB
      have h6 : A.toLinSols = B.toLinSols := by
        simp_all [QuadSols.ext]
      have h7 : A.quadSol = B.quadSol := by
        funext i
        have h8 : (χ.quadraticACCs i) A.val = 0 := A.quadSol i
        have h9 : (χ.quadraticACCs i) B.val = 0 := B.quadSol i
        simp_all [hB]
      exact QuadSols.ext (by simp_all [LinSols.ext])
    exact h4
  exact h

intro v
  have h₁ : False := by
    have h₂ : False := by
      -- Use the contradiction to simplify the proof and focus on the logical flow.
      simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, add_assoc]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> norm_num at *
      <;> omega
    exact h₂
  exfalso
  exact h₁

have h_main : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsIncl := by
    intro S T h
    have h₁ : (S : χ.1.Charges) = (T : χ.1.Charges) := by
      have h₂ : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.1.Charges) = (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.1.Charges) := by simpa using h
      -- Simplify the expressions using the definition of quadSolsIncl
      simp [MulActionHom.comp_apply, ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl_apply] at h₂
      <;> simp_all [QuadSols.toLinSols_val]
      <;> aesop
    -- Use the extensionality of QuadSols to conclude S = T
    have h₂ : S = T := by
      apply QuadSols.ext
      simpa using h₁
    exact h₂
  exact h_main

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := by
    simp_all [ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl, ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols]
  -- Now use the extensionality lemma for QuadSols to conclude S = T
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    apply QuadSols.ext
    exact h₁
  exact h₂

have h : ∀ (S : χ.QuadSols), (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = S.val := by
    intro S
    simp [χ.quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl]
    <;>
    (try cases S <;> simp_all [ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.val, ACCSystemLinear.chargesAddCommMonoid]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try rfl)
  intro S T hST
  have hS : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = S.val := h S
  have hT : (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) = T.val := h T
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := by simpa [hS, hT] using hST
  exact QuadSols.ext h₁

have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  have h₂ : Function.Injective (χ.linSolsIncl : χ.LinSols → χ.Charges) := by sorry
  exact Function.Injective.comp h₂ h₁
LinSols_injective

intro S T h
  have h1 : S.val = T.val := by
    simp [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.map_smul, linSolsIncl_apply] at h ⊢
    <;>
    (try simp_all [aessop]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [aessop]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    aesop
  have h2 : (S : χ.LinSols).val = (T : χ.LinSols).val := by simpa using h1
  have h3 : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := by
    exact LinSols.ext h2
  have h4 : S = T := by
    cases S
    cases T
    simp_all [Struct.ext_iff]
    <;>
    aesop
  exact h4
S.val

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := by
    simpa [quadSolsIncl, linSolsIncl, MulActionHom.coe_mulActionHom] using
      congr_arg (fun x => (x.val)) h
  have h₂ : S.toLinSols.val = T.toLinSols.val := by
    simpa [QuadSols.toLinSols] using h₁
  have h₃ : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := by
    apply ACCSystemLinear.linSols.ext
    simpa [LinSols.val] using h₂
  have h₄ : S = T := by
    apply Subtype.ext
    <;> simp_all [QuadSols.toLinSols]
    <;>
    (try cases S <;> cases T <;> simp_all) <;>
    (try aesop)
  exact h₄

have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    intro S T h
    have h₂ : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := by simpa using h
    exact Subtype.ext h₂
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.linSolsIncl := by
    intro S T h
    have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by simpa using h
    exact linSols.ext h₃
  -- Use the fact that the composition of injective functions is injective.
  have h₃ : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols → χ.Charges) := by
    -- We need to show that if χ.quadSolsIncl S = χ.quadSolsIncl T, then S = T.
    -- Since χ.quadSolsIncl is the composition of χ.quadSolsInclLinSols and χ.linSolsIncl,
    -- and both are injective, the composition is injective.
    have h₄ : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols → χ.Charges) := by
      -- Use the fact that the composition of injective functions is injective.
      have h₅ : χ.quadSolsIncl = χ.linSolsIncl.comp (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) := by
        -- Show that χ.quadSolsIncl is the composition of χ.quadSolsInclLinSols and χ.linSolsIncl.
        ext S
        simp [quadSolsIncl, linSolsIncl]
        <;>
        simp_all [MulActionHom.comp_apply]
        <;>
        aesop
      rw [h₅]
      -- Use the fact that the composition of injective functions is injective.
      exact Function.Injective.comp h₂ h₁
    exact h₄
  exact h₃

have h : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsIncl := by
    have h₁ : Function.Injective (fun x : χ.QuadSols => (x : χ.Charges)) := by
      intro x y hxy
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      -- We need to show that if two elements of QuadSols are equal as charges, then they are equal as QuadSols.
      -- This is true because the Charges are injective and the quadratic conditions are satisfied.
      have h₂ : x.val = y.val := by
        simp_all [QuadSols]
      -- Since the Charges are equal, and the quadratic conditions are satisfied, the elements of QuadSols are equal.
      cases x <;> cases y <;> simp_all [QuadSols]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try aesop)
    -- The injectivity of the inclusion map follows from the injectivity of the underlying Charges.
    have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsIncl := by
      intro x y hxy
      have h₃ : (x : χ.Charges) = (y : χ.Charges) := by
        simpa [MulActionHom.coe_comp, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl] using hxy
      exact h₁ h₃
    exact h₂
  exact h

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (χ.quadSolsIncl) S = (χ.quadSolsIncl) T := h
  have h₂ : χ.linearSolsIncl (S.toLinSols) = χ.linearSolsIncl (T.toLinSols) := by sorry
  have h₃ : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := by sorry
  have h₄ : S.val = T.val := by sorry
  have h₅ : S = T := by sorry
  exact h₅

simp [quadSolsIncl, linSolsIncl]
  <;> rfl
sop

have h1 : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) := by
    intro S T hST
    have h1 : (S : χ.LinSols) = (T : χ.LinSols) := hST
    exact Eq.symm (Quot.eq (by simpa using h1))
  have h2 : Function.Injective (χ.linSolsIncl : χ.LinSols →ₗ[ℚ] χ.Charges) := by
    intro S T hST
    have h1 : (S : χ.Charges) = (T : χ.Charges) := hST
    exact Eq.symm (Quot.eq (by simpa using h1))
  -- Since both inclusions are injective, their composition is injective.
  have h3 : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.Charges) := by
    intro S T hST
    have h4 : (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) S = (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) T := by
      have h5 : χ.linSolsIncl ((χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) S) = χ.linSolsIncl ((χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) T) := hST
      have h6 : χ.linSolsIncl ((χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) S) = (S : χ.Charges) := by
        simp [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl]
        <;> rfl
      have h7 : χ.linSolsIncl ((χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols →[ℚ] χ.LinSols) T) = (T : χ.Charges) := by
        simp [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl]
        <;> rfl
      have h8 : (S : χ.Charges) = (T : χ.Charges) := by
        rw [h6, h7] at h5
        exact h5
      -- Use the injectivity of the linear inclusion to deduce that the preimages are equal.
      have h9 : χ.quadSolsInclLinSols S = χ.quadSolsInclLinSols T := by
        have h10 : (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols S : χ.LinSols) = (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols T : χ.LinSols) := by
          have h11 : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) := hST
          have h12 : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = (S : χ.Charges) := by
            simp [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl]
            <;> rfl
          have h13 : (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) = (T : χ.Charges) := by
            simp [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl]
            <;> rfl
          have h14 : (S : χ.Charges) = (T : χ.Charges) := by
            rw [h12, h13] at h11
            exact h11
          simp_all [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols, χ.linSolsIncl]
          <;> rfl
        exact_mod_cast h10
      exact h9
    -- Use the injectivity of the quadratic inclusion to deduce that the preimages are equal.
    have h5 : S = T := by
      apply h1
      exact h4
    exact h5
  exact h3

try:

`(quadSolsIncl χ) S = (linSolsIncl χ) (S.toLinSols) = S.toLin

intro u v h
  have h' : (χ.quadSolsIncl u : χ.Charges) = (χ.quadSolsIncl v : χ.Charges) := h
  have h₁ : (χ.quadSolsIncl u : χ.Charges) = u.val := rfl
  have h₂ : (χ.quadSolsIncl v : χ.Charges) = v.val := rfl
  rw [h₁, h₂] at h'
  have h₃ : u.val = v.val := h'
  have h₄ : u.toLinSols.val = v.toLinSols.val := by
    have h₅ : u.toLinSols.val = u.val := rfl
    have h₆ : v.toLinSols.val = v.val := rfl
    rw [h₅, h₆]
    exact h₃
  have h₅ : u.toLinSols = v.toLinSols := by
    apply LinSols.ext
    exact h₄
  have h₆ : u = v := by
    cases u
    cases v
    simp_all [QuadSols, Subtype.ext_iff]
  exact h₆

have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    refine' fun _ _ h => _
    exact Subtype.ext (by simpa [QuadSols.toLinSols] using h)
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.linSolsIncl := by
    intro S T h
    have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by simpa using h
    exact Subtype.ext h₃
  have h₃ : χ.quadSolsIncl = χ.quadSolsInclLinSols.toMulActionHom.comp χ.linSolsIncl.toMulActionHom := by
    ext
    simp [quadSolsIncl, linSolsIncl]
    <;> funext
    <;> simp [quadSolsInclLinSols]
    <;> rfl
  have h₄ : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols.toMulActionHom.comp χ.linSolsIncl.toMulActionHom) := by
    apply Function.Injective.comp
    · exact h₁
    · exact h₂
  simpa [h₃] using h₄

have h₁ : Function.Injective (ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols χ) := by
    apply mulEquiv.smulBy_smul_injective
  have h₂ : Function.Injective (ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl χ) := by
    have h₂₁ : Function.Injective (χ.linSolsIncl) := by
      intro S T hST
      have h₂₂ : S.val = T.val := by
        simp_all [ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl]
      simp_all [ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.ext]
    exact h₂₁
  intro x y hxy
  have h₃ : (χ.quadSolsIncl) x = (χ.quadSolsIncl) y := hxy
  have h₄ : (ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols χ) x = (ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols χ) y := by
    have h₄₁ : (χ.quadSolsIncl) x = (ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl (χ : ACCSystemLinear)) ((ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols χ) x) := by
      simp [quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols]
      <;> rfl
    have h₄₂ : (χ.quadSolsIncl) y = (ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl (χ : ACCSystemLinear)) ((ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols χ) y) := by
      simp [quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols]
      <;> rfl
    rw [h₄₁, h₄₂] at h₃
    exact h₂ h₃
  have h₅ : x = y := by
    apply h₁
    exact h₄
  exact h₅
χ.LinSols).val

intro S T h
  have h₁ : χ.quadSolsIncl S = χ.quadSolsIncl T := h
  have h₂ : (S.toLinSols.val : χ.toACCSystemLinear.toACCSystemCharges.Charges) = (T.toLinSols.val : χ.toACCSystemLinear.toACCSystemCharges.Charges) := by sorry
  have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by sorry
  have h₄ : S = T := by sorry
  exact h₄
successful_attempts:
have h : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsIncl.toFun) := by
    intro S T hST
    -- hST : S.val = T.val
    apply QuadSols.ext
    simpa [quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply] using hST
  exact h

have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
    <;> assumption
  
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.linSolsIncl := by
    apply ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl_injective
    <;> assumption
  
  have h₃ : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols → χ.Charges) := by
    have h₄ : (χ.quadSolsIncl : χ.QuadSols → χ.Charges) = (χ.linSolsIncl : χ.LinSols → χ.Charges) ∘ (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) := by
      funext S
      simp [ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsIncl, MulActionHom.comp_apply]
      <;> rfl
    rw [h₄]
    exact Function.Injective.comp h₂ h₁
  
  exact h₃

have h_main : Function.Injective (fun (S : χ.QuadSols) => S.val) := by
    intro S T h
    have h₁ : S.val = T.val := h
    have h₂ : S = T := by
      apply QuadSols.ext
      exact h₁
    exact h₂
  
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsIncl := by
    have h₃ : χ.quadSolsIncl = (fun (S : χ.QuadSols) => S.val) := by
      funext S
      rfl
    rw [h₃]
    exact h_main
  
  exact h₂

have h_main : ∀ (S T : χ.QuadSols), χ.quadSolsIncl S = χ.quadSolsIncl T → S = T := by
    intro S T h
    have h₁ : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) := by exact_mod_cast h
    -- Simplify the expressions for quadSolsIncl S and quadSolsIncl T
    have h₂ : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = S.val := by
      -- quadSolsIncl S = linSolsIncl (quadSolsInclLinSols S)
      -- quadSolsInclLinSols S = S.toLinSols
      -- linSolsIncl S.toLinSols = S.toLinSols.val = S.val
      simp [ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols, ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl]
      <;> simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;> rfl
    have h₃ : (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) = T.val := by
      simp [ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols, ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl]
      <;> simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;> rfl
    -- Conclude that S.val = T.val
    have h₄ : S.val = T.val := by
      rw [h₂] at h₁
      rw [h₃] at h₁
      exact h₁
    -- Use the extensionality of QuadSols to conclude that S = T
    apply QuadSols.ext
    exact h₄
  
  exact fun S T h => h_main S T h

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₂ : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) := by simpa using h
    -- Expand the definition of `quadSolsIncl`
    have h₃ : (χ.quadSolsIncl S : χ.Charges) = S.val := by
      simp [ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl]
      <;>
      rfl
    have h₄ : (χ.quadSolsIncl T : χ.Charges) = T.val := by
      simp [ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsIncl, ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl]
      <;>
      rfl
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    rw [h₄] at h₂
    exact h₂
  -- Use `QuadSols.ext` to deduce `S = T`
  apply QuadSols.ext h₁
